summary: Phase 6b partial: Expanded iteration pattern in strict_density_M_reflexive theorem. Core structure verified - each iteration either returns strict witness or has U~M case requiring iteration. Termination guaranteed by finite subformula closure. 23 sorries total (up from 17 due to exposed iteration cases).

artifacts.summary: Added strict_density_M_reflexive theorem, expanded iteration cases, verified pattern compiles
Updated handoff with iteration pattern details and termination argument

partial_progress.details: Iteration pattern fully expanded and verified. Each sorry is a 'U ~ M' case requiring well-founded recursion. Termination guaranteed by finite formula consumption.

next_steps: Implement fuel-based well-founded recursion using Nat.rec. Each U~M iteration sorry follows the same pattern: extract chi from h_not_M'U, prove G(chi) not in M, apply Case A, check strictness.
